extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won the Champs-Élysées sprint to equal Merckx's all-time Tour stage record at 34 victories.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates evolved tactically mid-tour (stage 9 onward), shifting from poor positioning to patient breakaway management supporting Pogačar's dominance.
Finish line moved 400m further up Champs-Élysées, giving sprinters recovery time for last-corner positioning errors with functioning leadouts.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: showed unprecedented nervousness at start, suggesting mental pressure scales with historical stakes even for veteran sprinters
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: demonstrated mature solo decision-making throughout final week, tactical evolution matching UAE team's mid-race strategic improvement
